dialogueLines.dialogueID: Do you mind? We're having a private conversation.

dialogueLines.dialogueText: Well, so you're the new bar owner. I'm Mirage the Marvelous, and this is my assistant, Ace.
I heard you're looking for entertainers, but you can't afford us. She pays us in gold.
The only magic trick you'll be seeing is us making you disappear from this town. Shall we?
Seems like you had a few tricks up your own sleeve. Guess I underestimated you.
Don't worry, we'll stay out of your way. There's no sum she could pay us to fight you again.
Come find us when you've handled your business. We're not fighters, but we can still put on a show.
